zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Mayor Matthew Randall於1571年7月21日出生在英國薩默塞特巴斯時，他的父親Sir John Randall Of Bath26歲，母親Johanna Webb26歲。他於1595年4月16日與Agnes Cullen在英國薩默塞特巴斯 艾比結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1634年在英國薩默塞特巴斯 福盧姆被列為chamberlain of the city council of bath。他去世於1639年1月16日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Mayor Matthew Randall于1571年7月21日出生在英国薩默塞特巴斯时，他的父亲Sir John Randall Of Bath26岁，母亲Johanna Webb26岁。他于1595年4月16日与Agnes Cullen在英国薩默塞特巴斯 艾比结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1634年在英国薩默塞特巴斯 福盧姆被列为chamberlain of the city council of bath。他去世于1639年1月16日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴斯 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randell
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German   Randel  .

variants.name: Randon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel.
English: probably a variant of Randall , with assimilation of n-l to n-n.
French (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando, a short form of names based on the element rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’.

variants.name: Randol
meanings: English: altered form of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randal
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Randal in Gulen, a compound of Old Norse runnr ‘copse, thicket, grove’ + dalr ‘valley’.

variants.name: Randles
meanings: English and Irish (Louth): variant of Randall , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland this is sometimes a variant of Reynolds .

variants.name: Randle
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German Randel or of its Bavarian variant Randl.

variants.name: Rendell
meanings: English (Somerset, Devon, and Dorset): variant of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randel
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
South German: variant of   Rand   3.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rendall
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Scottish: habitational name from Rendall (Orkney), named with a stream-name of uncertain origin + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of Swedish   Rendahl  .

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

variants.name: Mathew
meanings: Variant spelling of   Matthew .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Mayor Matthew Randall was born on 21 July 1571, in Bath, Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Randall Of Bath, was 26 and his mother, Johanna Webb, was 26. He married Agnes Cullen on 16 April 1595, in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. In 1634, at the age of 63, his occupation is listed as chamberlain of the city council of bath in Bath Forum, Somerset, England. He died on 16 January 1639, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Mayor Matthew Randall est né le 21 juillet 1571, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Randall Of Bath, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna Webb, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Cullen le 16 avril 1595, à Bath Abbey, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. En 1634, à l’âge de 63 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est chamberlain of the city council of bath à Bath Forum, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1639, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Bath Abbey, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bath Abbey, North East Somerset Unitary: Bath Abbey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Mayor Matthew Randall am 21. Juli 1571 in Bath, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Randall Of Bath 26 und seine Mutter Johanna Webb 26. Er hat am 16. April 1595 in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England Agnes Cullen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1634, als er 63 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als chamberlain of the city council of bath in Bath Forum, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Januar 1639 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bath Abbey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Mayor Matthew Randall è nato il il 21 luglio 1571 nel Bath, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Randall Of Bath, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Webb, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Cullen il 16 aprile 1595, nel Bath Abbey, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1634, all'età di 63 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come chamberlain of the city council of bath nel Bath Forum, Somerset, England. Morì il 16 gennaio 1639, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Mayor Matthew Randallが1571年7月21日にイギリスソメルセトバスで生まれた時，父Sir John Randall Of Bathは26歳，母Johanna Webbは26歳であった。1595年4月16日にイギリスソメルセトバス アビーでAgnes Cullenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1634年，63歳の時，イギリスソメルセトバス フォーウムでの職業はchamberlain of the city council of bathと記録されている。彼は1639年1月16日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトバス アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Mayor Matthew Randall(이)가 1571년 7월 21일 영국 서머세트 바스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Randall Of Bath(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Webb(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1595년 4월 16일 영국 서머세트 바스 애브브이에서 Agnes Cullen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1634년, 63세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 바스 포럼에서 chamberlain of the city council of bath이었다. 그는 1639년 1월 16일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Mayor Matthew Randall nasceu em 21 de julho de 1571, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Randall Of Bath, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Webb, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Cullen em 16 de abril de 1595, em Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1634, com 63 anos, sua profissão aparece como chamberlain of the city council of bath em Bath Forum, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1639, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Mayor Matthew Randall родился 21 июля 1571 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Randall Of Bath было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Webb, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Cullen 16 апреля 1595 г. в местности бат эбби, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1634 году, в возрасте 63 лет,  он работал по профессии chamberlain of the city council of bath в местности бат форум, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 16 января 1639 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности бат эбби, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Mayor Matthew Randall nació el 21 de julio de 1571, en Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Randall Of Bath, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Johanna Webb, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Agnes Cullen el 16 de abril de 1595, en Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. En 1634, a la edad de 63 años, su ocupación registrada era chamberlain of the city council of bath en Bath Forum, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió el 16 de enero de 1639, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Bath Abbey, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
